releaseNotes:
Version 7.0.0 — Quiz Analytics, Learning Progress, Achievements & Daily Reminders

Quiz History & Analytics
• Quiz results are now saved automatically after every quiz
• Per-rule score tracking — see which Tajweed rules you got right or wrong
• Quiz History screen with overall stats: average score, best score, total quizzes taken
• Weak Areas section highlights rules below 70% accuracy
• Strong Areas section highlights rules above 80% accuracy
• Color-coded recent quiz list (last 10 quizzes)
• Quiz average score shown on home dashboard (tap to view history)
• "View History" button added to quiz results dialog

Learning Progress Path
• "Mark as Learned" toggle button at the bottom of every sub-rule page
• Progress bars on the Rules list showing completion per category (e.g. 2/4 learned)
• Checkmark indicators on sub-rule items that have been completed
• Progress refreshes automatically when navigating between screens

Achievement Badges
• 12 achievement badges across 4 categories: Learning, Quiz, Memorization, and Activity
• Badges include: First Step, Dedicated Student, Halfway There, Tajweed Master, Quiz Taker, Perfect Score, Quiz Regular, Quiz Champion, Memorizer, Hafiz in Progress, Bookworm, Student of Knowledge
• Automatic badge checking — earn badges as you use the app
• Toast notifications when a new badge is earned
• Achievements card on home screen showing earned/total count
• Full Achievements screen with 2-column grid of earned and locked badges

Daily Practice Reminder
• Configurable daily notification to remind you to practice Tajweed
• Time picker to set your preferred reminder time
• Enable/disable toggle with status display
• Survives device reboots — reminder reschedules automatically
• Settings accessible from the About/Settings page
• Notification opens the app directly when tapped

─────────────────────────────────

Version 6.0.0 
 New Quiz Mode and Bug Fixes

Version 5.1.0 — Ustad Mode Session Viewer

• Swipeable session viewer — browse previous sessions by swiping left and right, like scrolling photos
• Quick navigation: tap "+ New Session" from the session viewer, or "View Previous Sessions" from edit mode
• No more going back to the Surah list just to switch between sessions
• Session counter shows your current position (e.g. 2/5 Sessions)
• New session editing remains unchanged — all tools, voice notes, and scoring work as before

─────────────────────────────────

Version 5.0.0 — Ustad Mode, Practice Mode & Mode Selection

Overview
Introduces two major features to Surahs Correction: Ustad Mode and Practice Mode. A new Mode Selection dialog appears when tapping any surah, offering three pathways.
All existing functionality (annotations, floating audio player, memorization tracking) remains untouched.

Mode Selection
• Surah Correction — Existing annotation and audio player experience (unchanged)
• Ustad Mode — Teacher-led correction sessions with voice notes
• Practice Mode — Self-study with recording and Qari comparison
• Long press for memorization status remains unchanged

Ustad Mode
Designed for teacher-student sessions. The Ustad marks corrections on Quran text, with each session saved independently.
• Session-based: each review creates a new session with its own annotations and score
• Past sessions preserved and reviewable in read-only mode
• Full annotation toolkit: freehand drawing, circles, sticky notes, eraser, undo, clear, color picker
• Voice recording per ayah — long press to record Ustad's pronunciation (M4A/AAC)
• Mic indicator on ayahs with voice notes (tap to play, long press to re-record/delete)
• Tajweed confidence score calculated from correction density per ayah

Practice Mode
Self-study mode: record yourself per ayah, compare with Qari (Sheikh Mishary Rashid Alafasy), and self-rate.
• Per-ayah navigation with Previous/Next controls
• Record your recitation, play it back, then play the Qari's version
• Rate each ayah: Good, Needs Work, or Skip (auto-advances after rating)
• Qari audio integrates with AudioCacheManager — works offline for cached ayahs
• Session summary: Good/Needs Work/Skipped counts with self-confidence percentage

Surah List Enhancements
• Ustad badge with latest tajweed score percentage
• Average tajweed rate displayed in header alongside memorization rate
• Live refresh when returning from any mode
• Existing indicators preserved (annotations and memorized badges)
